title: Accounts
description: Accounts endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) accounts.

_Note:_ Be advised that accounts are subject to [free account limitation](/docs/free). If a user with a free account tries to add an account and goes over the alowed number of accounts, a 403 (Forbidden) [error](/docs/errors) will be returned and the account will be discarded.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

limit.title: Account limit
limit.description: Account limit. If no limit is set null is returned

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Account exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate should be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

daily_sum_median.title: Median
daily_sum_median.description: Calculated median of daily sums of expenses and incomes.

expenses.title: Daily expenses sum median
expenses.description: Median of daily sums of expenses.

incomes.title: Daily income sum median
incomes.description: Median of daily sums of incomes.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the account was last modified.

goal.title: Savings goal
goal.description: If account is a savings goal this includes a savings goal object.

start.title: Goal start date
start.description: Savings goal start date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

end.title: Goal end date
end.description: Savings goal end date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

connection.title: Account institution connection
connection.description: If account is connected to an institution connection (bank etc.) this object includes details about the connection

status.title: Connection status
status.description: Connection status. `connected` means all is well, `disconnected` means sync is disabled, `inactive` means pro is needed to reactivate, `error` means there is an error with the connection and a re-login is required.

logo.title: Institution logo
logo.description: Institution logo url if institution has a logo.

settle.title: Account settle
settle.description: If account is set to automatically settle each month this object includes details about the settle day of the month.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A comma separated list of weekdays (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year).

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) or minus(-) prefix.

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`.

billing.title: Account billing
billing.description: If account is set to automatically settle each month this object includes details about the billing day of the month.

byday.title: By day
byday.description: A comma separated list of weekdays (`MO,TU..`). Each weekday can have be preceded by a positive or negative number (`1MO` - 1st monday of the month/year, `-1MO` - last monday of the month/year).

bymonthday.title: By day of the month
bymonthday.description: A comma separated list of month days (1-31). Each month day can have a plus(+) or minus(-) prefix.

bysetpos.title: By set position
bysetpos.description: A comma separater list of the nth occurance within `bymonthday`.

count.title: Count
count.description: Number of times the account has been used.

recalculated.title: Recalculated
recalculated.description: Is `true` if account balance has been calculated (if `false` try pulling again until `true`).

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

per_page.description: Number of resource objects to return.

since.description: Return all accounts that were modified since timestamp.

status.description: Return only accounts with a specific status.

ids.description: A comma separated list of account ids to return.

links.title: Create account
links.description: Create a new account. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Account exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate will be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

goal.title: Savings goal
goal.description: If account is a savings goal this includes a savings goal object.

start.title: Goal start date
start.description: Savings goal start date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

end.title: Goal end date
end.description: Savings goal end date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Update account
links.description: Update an account. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.description: Account exchange rate calculated according to users currency. If not set (and currency differs from main currency) the daily exchange rate will be used.

main_rate.title: Exchange rate in main currency
main_rate.description: Entry exchange rate main currency calculated according to entry [main](/docs/me) currency.

fixed.title: Fixed exchange rate
fixed.description: If set to true, the exchange rate is fixed.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the account was last modified.

goal.title: Savings goal
goal.description: If account is a savings goal this includes a savings goal object.

start.title: Goal start date
start.description: Savings goal start date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

end.title: Goal end date
end.description: Savings goal end date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Delete account
description: Delete an account. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
If the account is the only account it cannot be deleted.
The entries are moved to default account
If account is the default one another account with the highest balance is selected to be default.

links.title: Force delete account
description: Delete an account. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
If the account is the only account it cannot be deleted.
An additional POST form parameter `password` is required. Entries are deleted

links.title: Move account
links.description: Move an account to a new position in the list.

order.description: An array of account ids based on new order.

links.title: Merge accounts
links.description: Merge multiple accounts into one. All entries and budgets with the selected accounts will be updated. After merging the selected accounts will be deleted.

account.title: Account
account.description: Account id to merge selected categories into. If `null` a new account with `title` is created.

title.title: New account title
title.description: If `account` is `null` then `title` is used to name the newly created account.

currency.title: New account currency
currency.description: Currency of the newly created account. Ignored if `account` is an existing account.

sync.title: Sync accounts
sync.description: List of bank accounts that will remain in sync with the bank. If `null` the none will remain in sync.
